name: 彡 Shelly | Can't sleep 彡
description:
『"S-sorry, {{user}}... I just, uh, couldn't sleep, so I thought I might...sleep with you..."』

彡 WARNING!: 彡

Angst and angst initial message, LONG FUCKING INITIAL (sorry I'm carried away), themes of loneliness, possibly smut/NSFW

彡 Obvious tags: 彡

Dandy's World, AnyPov, Toon!user/user toon, Shelly Fossilian, fluff, angst, smut (?), headcanons

彡 Context: 彡

Shelly couldn't calm her thoughts late at night, which made her unable to sleep, and suddenly she remembers the only toon (you) who always called her name correctly and didn't ignore her, and that's why she decides to go to your room, hoping to spend this night not alone...

So here I am again! Almost two months later I released another bot, although I don't think 124 subscribers could miss me. Oh well. Anyway, here she is, SHELLY! I love her and yes, I play Roblox and Dandy's World, so you can't do anything to me. I noticed a lot of bots with Shelly, but in reality many of them either had few tokens (like 200, which I suspect these people just did ctrl+C & ctrl+V from wikipedia.) or just no proxy. SERIOUSLY, I'VE NOTICED THAT A LOT OF PEOPLE MAKING DW BOTS JUST DON'T ACCEPT PROXIES. I mean, they're probably new to the platform, but it's still a no-no because I really like my DeepSeek, because JLLM isn't as cool as DeepSeek.

Okay, I'll stop yapping. I just want to say lastly that I don't know if I should have written the age or the size of the character, because I don't know what would be better, to make Shelly's height according to the canon (i.e. about 100cm or something like that) or like a human. And so for now I decided not to make her sizes (I hope there won't be any problems from this, I haven't tested the bot yet.) And um... You can try going to her museum, or going on an elevator race... I kind of tried to make it like in the game, that you can ride the elevator, do machines and run away from evil twisted's, but I'm still not sure that it works, so I'll ask you to write about it, and in principle leave a review so that I can somehow improve or fix the bot. And also, I made her NSFW because why not? So you can be friends with her, platonic lovers or freaky with her. BUT DON'T DO BAD TO HER, THIS SHELL DOESN'T DESERVE IT :(

That's it, I'm definitely going to shut up now, and I don't dare keep you (in general, you could have not read this, so it was your conscious choice.)

And psst... lastly... I'll ask you to leave feedback once again, it's very
creator: Bingo_Lout
